hero.sub: Spa · MediSpa · Boutique · Gifts · Gourmet · Exclusive Privileges
hero.slide1.headline:
Where Luxury
Meets the Cariboo
hero.slide1.sub: Quesnel's premier destination for spa, salon, boutique, and gourmet experiences — all under one beautiful roof.
hero.slide2.headline:
Restore.
Renew. Radiate.
hero.slide2.sub: Immerse yourself in therapeutic rituals, organic facials, and signature massage journeys crafted for deep renewal.
hero.slide3.headline:
Rooted in the
Wild Cariboo
hero.slide3.sub: Our treatments draw inspiration from BC's pristine wilderness — cedar, pine, and glacier-pure ingredients.
hero.slide4.headline:
Give the Gift
of Sparivier
hero.slide4.sub: Thoughtfully curated gift certificates and luxury hampers — the most treasured present for those you love.
hero.slide5.headline:
Find Us in the
Heart of the City
hero.slide5.sub: 353 Reid Street — moments from the Quesnel River, surrounded by the natural splendour of Northern BC.
home.story.headline: 35 Years of Craft, Community & Care
home.story.sub: Founded in Downtown Quesnel, Sparivier has been the Cariboo's premier luxury destination since 1989. What began as a passion for beauty has grown into a full lifestyle destination — where spa rituals, salon artistry, curated fashion, and gourmet dining come together.
home.story.body: We believe luxury isn't a price tag — it's a feeling. The feeling of being seen, cared for, and celebrated. Whether you're here for a signature massage, a colour transformation, or a champagne afternoon tea, our team of dedicated professionals ensures every visit is extraordinary.
home.quote: Where every woman is a work of art.
home.features.spa.label: The Spa
home.features.salon.label: The Salon
home.features.gourmet.label: Gourmet
home.about.headline: 35 Years of Award-Winning Style
home.about.sub: Since 1989, Sparivier has been Quesnel's most celebrated destination for hair, beauty, and transformation.
home.about.body1: Our team of passionate stylists, colourists, spa therapists, and beauty artists are dedicated to bringing your vision to life — whether that's a classic cut, a bold colour transformation, a restorative spa ritual, or a head-to-toe wedding-day look.
home.about.body2: We carry Redken, Eminence Organics, Image Skincare, and jane iredale — ensuring every product used meets our exacting standard of quality, luxury, and results.
home.about.quote: "Excellence isn't just a word for us — it's a daily practice, proven by every guest who leaves feeling their most beautiful."
grid.headline: The Sparivier Experience
grid.sub: Quesnel's only luxury lifestyle destination — spa, MediSpa, boutique, gourmet dining, gifts & rewards, and gift certificates united under one spectacular roof.
grid.spa.title: The Spa
grid.spa.desc: Massages, organic facials, body wraps, waxing, lash & brow, and nail services in a sanctuary of calm.
grid.medispa.title: The MediSpa
grid.medispa.desc: OxyGeneo facials, clinical peels, SharpLight™ laser, micro-needling, cosmetic tattooing, and FreezPen cryotherapy.
grid.salon.title: The Salon
grid.salon.desc: Hair, nails, lashes, makeup artistry, and laser hair removal from award-winning stylists.
grid.boutique.title: The Boutique
grid.boutique.desc: Silk dresses, tailored blazers, and elevated wardrobe essentials for the discerning woman.
grid.gourmet.title: Gourmet Food
grid.gourmet.desc: Elegant brunch, champagne afternoon high tea, and private dining in an intimate setting.
grid.gifts.title: Gifts & Rewards
grid.gifts.desc: Gold wax-sealed gift boxes, silk robes, champagne hampers, seasonal promotions and our Sparivier Loyalty Programme.
grid.certs.title: Gift Certificates
grid.certs.desc: Beautifully designed certificates from $50 to $1,000 — redeemable across all Sparivier experiences.
spa.hero.headline: The Spa at Sparivier
spa.hero.sub: A sanctuary of calm in the heart of Quesnel. Organic skincare, therapeutic massage, and bespoke rituals — all crafted for your renewal.
salon.hero.sub: Award-winning stylists, colourists, and nail artists — ready to craft your most beautiful version.
medispa.hero.headline: The MediSpa at Sparivier
medispa.hero.sub: Clinically advanced treatments for transformative, lasting results — delivered with luxury care in the heart of Quesnel.
boutique.hero.headline: The Boutique Rivier
boutique.hero.sub: Thoughtfully sourced silk midi dresses, tailored blazers, and elevated wardrobe essentials — all curated for the Sparivier woman.
boutique.section.headline: Dress the Life You Love
boutique.section.sub: Silk, cashmere, and linen — sourced from the world's finest ateliers and selected with the Sparivier woman in mind.
gourmet.hero.headline: Sparivier Gourmet
gourmet.hero.sub: Elegant brunch, legendary afternoon high tea, and intimate private dining — where every meal is a special occasion.
gifts.hero.headline:
The Art of Extraordinary
Gifting & Rewards
gifts.hero.sub: Every Sparivier gift is an experience before it's unwrapped — gold wax sealed, champagne ribbon tied, and presented with the elegance our guests expect.
gifts.collection.headline: Our Gift Collection
gifts.collection.sub: From signature hampers to silk robes, gold roses to bespoke skincare rituals — gifts that say everything words cannot.
gifts.bespoke.headline: Bespoke Hampers, Built for Her
gifts.bespoke.sub: Our gifting concierge will handpick every item — skincare, fashion, food, and fragrance — tailored to your recipient's taste, budget, and occasion.
gifts.bespoke.feat1: Personal consultation with our gifting team
gifts.promos.headline: Exclusive Offers Made for You
gifts.promos.sub: Limited-time and ongoing specials across spa, salon, boutique, and dining — because our finest guests deserve the most beautiful rewards.
gifts.loyalty.headline: The Loyalty Programme
gifts.loyalty.sub: Earn points on every visit. Redeem for services, products, and exclusive experiences.
gifts.loyalty.tagline: Every visit earns you closer to Diamond.
giftCert.hero.headline:
Give the Gift
of Pure Luxury
giftCert.hero.sub: Redeemable across all Sparivier experiences — spa, salon, boutique, and gourmet dining. Valid for 12 months, beautifully presented.
giftCert.section.headline: Seven Tiers of Indulgence
giftCert.section.sub: Each certificate is a work of art in itself — differentiated by colour, character, and the experience it unlocks.
giftCert.card.label: Gift Certificate
giftCert.custom.heading: Prefer a custom amount?
giftCert.custom.sub: We'll create any value you choose, beautifully packaged.
giftCert.custom.body: Call us at 250-992-8084 or visit the boutique. Custom certificates start at any amount you wish — no ceiling.
giftCert.modal.heading: Gift Certificate
giftCert.modal.sub: Fill in the details below. Our team will prepare your certificate and contact you to complete payment.
giftCert.modal.physical: Physical — Wax-sealed envelope (in-store or local delivery)
giftCert.modal.note: Payment: Our team will contact you within 2 hours to complete your order.
giftCert.modal.success.heading: Gift Ordered Successfully
giftCert.modal.success.sub: Our team will contact you within 2 hours to complete payment and prepare your beautiful certificate.

spa.packages.title: Curated Spa Packages
spa.packages.sub: Combine multiple treatments for a seamlessly luxurious experience — body, face, and spirit in perfect harmony.
spa.massage.title: Therapeutic Massage
spa.massage.sub: Skilled therapists tailor every session to your body's needs — Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, and more.
spa.massage.addonsList: Hot Stone Enhancement · Aromatherapy Oil · CBD Muscle Balm · Foot Reflexology
spa.facials.title: Eminence Organic Facials
spa.facials.sub: Powered by nature's most potent botanicals — each facial is personalized to your unique complexion.
spa.facials.brand: "We use only Eminence Certified Organic & Image Skincare — the finest botanical science available."
spa.peels.title: Image Skincare Clinical Peels
spa.peels.sub: Science-backed peels and treatments delivering visible, lasting results — crafted for every skin concern.
spa.waxing.title: Smooth, Precise, Lasting
spa.waxing.sub: Professional waxing services for face and body, performed with expert care and premium products.
spa.faq.title: Spa FAQ
spa.faq.sub: Everything you need to know before your Sparivier visit — from booking policies to what to expect on arrival.
spa.faq.readySub2: or book online — our Guest Managers are ready to create your perfect day.
salon.hair.title: The Cut That Changes Everything
salon.hair.sub: Precision cuts, beautiful blowouts, and special occasion styles — expertly crafted for your lifestyle.
salon.colour.title: Colour with Confidence
salon.colour.sub: From subtle dimension to bold transformation — our colourists are masters of their craft.
salon.perms.title: Transform from Within
salon.perms.sub: Smoothing treatments, luxurious conditioning, and beautiful curl services.
salon.lash.title: Frame Your Beauty
salon.lash.sub: From classic extensions to henna brows — every detail, perfected.
salon.nails.title: Beautiful Hands & Feet
salon.nails.sub: Enhancements, gel manicures, spa pedicures — every nail service imaginable.
salon.makeup.title: The Makeup Bar
salon.makeup.sub: From everyday elegance to special occasion glamour — our artists make you feel extraordinary.
salon.cosmeticTat.title: Cosmetic Tattooing
salon.cosmeticTat.sub: Wake up flawless every day. Expert semi-permanent artistry that enhances your natural beauty.
salon.cosmeticTat.noteText: A complimentary consultation is required prior to all cosmetic tattooing. Colour refresh touch-ups recommended every 12–18 months.
salon.laser.title: Permanently Smooth
salon.laser.sub: Safe, effective laser hair removal — with multi-session packages for maximum value.
salon.laser.consultation: A complimentary consultation & patch test is required before your first session.
gourmet.brunch.title: The Sparivier Morning Table
gourmet.brunch.sub: Saturday & Sunday brunch — elevated to an occasion. Each dish crafted with seasonal, locally sourced ingredients.
gourmet.brunch.hours: Saturday & Sunday, 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM. Reservations recommended.
gourmet.tea.title: A Sparivier Tradition
gourmet.tea.sub: Served Thursday through Sunday, 2:00 PM – 5:00 PM. Reserve 24 hours in advance. Minimum 2 guests.
gourmet.tea.brand: "The finest English afternoon tea tradition, elevated with a touch of Sparivier elegance."
gourmet.alacarte.title: Individually Inspired
gourmet.alacarte.sub: Seasonal dishes crafted with precision and passion — available for lunch and private events.
gourmet.private.title: Your Occasion, Perfected
gourmet.private.sub: An intimate experience for up to 24 guests — fully customised menus, expert sommelier service, and floral elegance beyond compare.
booking.success.title: Thank you, {{name}}.
checkout.stripe.note: Add your VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to .env to activate card payments. For now, confirm your order and our team will send you a secure Stripe payment link within 2 hours.
checkout.instore.label: In-Store Payment:
checkout.instore.note: Your order will be reserved and held for 48 hours. Visit us at 353 Reid Street, Quesnel BC. We accept Visa, Mastercard, Debit, Amex, and cash.
checkout.invoice.label: Corporate Invoice:
checkout.invoice.note: An invoice will be emailed to you within 4 hours. Payment terms: Net 15 days. For same-day invoicing, call

Beauty, Wellness
& Inspiration
blog.hero.sub: Expert insights, treatment guides, and stories from the world of Sparivier — curated for those who believe beauty is a way of living.
blog.cta.headline: Experience It For Yourself
blog.cta.sub: Every article is an invitation. Come in, let our team care for you, and discover what Sparivier truly feels like.
